rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/16/19. Courtesy copies delivered on 6/20 were not filed stamped. In addition, Notice of Hearing on filing a pleading (i.e. Amended First and Final Account) cannot be served prior to the filing of the pleading, and the notice must be properly re-served for the continued hearing date. Filed stamped courtesy copy of Amended First and Final Account (filed on 6/18/19), along with all other documents needing review, should be provided to Room 202 by 7/5/19.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JACK D. KINDRED
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/16/19 - The Proof of Service filed 6/5/19 is not valid because it was filed concurrently with the Amended Petition. Notice of a Petition may not be mailed until after the petition has been filed (LRSF 14.21.A; Item 1 of the Notice of Hearing). All interested parties must receive or waive proper notice of the Amended Petition. Endorsed-filed copies of all documents must be received in Room 202 by 7/9/19.
